def fib4(n: int):
    """Efficiently calculate the n-th term of the Fib4 sequence. The sequence is defined by initial conditions: fib4(0)=0, fib4(1)=0, fib4(2)=2, fib4(3)=0. For n >= 4, each term is the sum of the four preceding terms: fib4(n) = fib4(n-1) + fib4(n-2) + fib4(n-3) + fib4(n-4). Avoid using recursive methods.
    >>> fib4(5)
    4
    >>> fib4(6)
    8
    >>> fib4(7)
    14
    """
